[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1100001 3
5 0110000 2
6 0000100 1
7 1000000 1

01 10 0110001 3
12 21 0110000 2 match 5
23 32 0100000 1
34 43 0100000 1
45 54 0000100 1 match 6
56 65 1001100 3
67 76 0001010 2
70 07 0001001 2

02 20 0110100 3
13 31 0100001 2
24 42 0110100 3
35 53 1000001 2
46 64 0010100 2
57 75 0001001 2
60 06 1011100 4
71 17 0000001 1

03 30 1100001 3 match 4
14 41 0110000 2 match 5
25 52 0000100 1 match 6
36 63 1000000 1 match 7
47 74 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3
50 05 1001101 4
61 16 0010000 1
72 27 0000000 a match 0 1 2 3

04 40 0110100 3
15 51 0000001 1
26 62 0010100 2
37 73 0000001 1
